title: In Kerala, breastfeeding figures show a marked improvement

Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari confirmed the legislation will be presented Monday, aiming to replace religion-based personal laws with a common framework. The BJP asserts tribal communities will be exempt, while the Trinamool Congress criticizes the move as political polarization, demanding extensive consultation.

He believes the team underestimated their opponents, prioritizing the upcoming England series over the T20I opener. Ramesh highlighted Ireland's smart execution, particularly with short-pitched bowling on larger grounds, and pointed to India's sloppy fielding and overconfidence as key factors in the shocking defeat.

The report highlights that relying solely on bank deposits is no longer viable as household savings shift. To achieve its $7.3 trillion economy target by 2030, the market needs greater depth, liquidity, and integration to efficiently bridge the rising capital gap and support national economic aspirations.

International aid and rescue teams are arriving, but damaged infrastructure, including hospitals, poses significant challenges, leaving an estimated 680,000 children in need of urgent assistance.

Incessant rains triggered flash floods in Keyi Panyor district, displacing residents and damaging infrastructure. Rescue operations are ongoing, with NDRF personnel deployed to bolster efforts. Authorities have issued alerts for further heavy rainfall, warning of increased risks of landslides and waterlogging across multiple districts.

title: 3 firefighters killed battling wildfires on Colorado-Utah border, blazes spread across US West
description: Tragedy struck as three firefighters lost their lives battling blazes along the Colorado-Utah border, with two others injured. Extreme weather conditions are fueling widespread wildfires across the western US, including a massive blaze in southwest Utah that has scorched over 144 square miles. Officials are grappling with difficult terrain and dangerously low humidity, leading to a severe wildfire season and emergency declarations in multiple states.

This operation precedes Prime Minister Zaidi's US visit, signaling his commitment to reforms amidst ongoing investigations.

Any escalation in US-Iran relations could impact global growth and energy markets, while diplomatic progress might boost investor confidence.

title: Female cadet pilot injured by running propeller at Kanpur’s flight training institute
description: A cadet pilot from Delhi sustained a lower back injury after being hit by a propeller while disembarking a training aircraft in Kanpur. The incident occurred when the 22-year-old reportedly exited the Tecnam P2006T before both engines were fully shut down. The DGCA has launched an inquiry, the instructor has been grounded, and the aircraft is out of service pending investigation.

Adityanath accused the previous SP government of firing on Ram devotees and diverting funds to graveyards instead of temples. Meanwhile, Yadav questioned Adityanath's frequent visits, suggesting they were to oversee alleged thefts and criticized Ayodhya's development quality.

Despite this, Sooryavanshi's impressive U19 World Cup and IPL performances showcase his potential.

Travelers grapple with the desire for authentic experiences versus their role in accelerating discovery and its consequences.

The Shahid Kapoor, Rashmika Mandanna and Kriti Sanon starrer faces a direct box office battle with the newly released multi-starrer 'Welcome to the Jungle.' While Akshay Kumar's adventure-comedy captured a vast majority of single-screen layouts and prime-time multiplex slots over the weekend, 'Cocktail 2' leveraged glowing word-of-mouth to post a strong 6.3% second Saturday trajectory. Backed by solid international collection and steady urban multi-plex footfalls, the film is steadily veering towards the coveted Rs. 100 crore domestic club.

Party leader Amit Malviya accused opposition leaders of misrepresenting defence minister Rajnath Singh's statement and demanded an apology for undermining the sacrifices of Indian soldiers. Four individuals faced hefty penalties totaling Rs 2 lakh and had their vehicles impounded for violating the Wildlife Protection Act. One offender was caught chasing a Tibetan gazelle within a sanctuary. This strict enforcement aims to safeguard Ladakh's fragile ecosystem and endangered wildlife, with authorities warning of continued stringent action against violators.

Thoroughly comparing lenders, understanding loan terms, and saving for a down payment are crucial for a smoother home-buying journey.

Meet Aarya, Indian-origin toddler set to become the youngest person to visit all 63 American National Parks
description: An Indian-origin toddler, Aarya, is on a remarkable journey to become the youngest person to visit all 63 of America's national parks. At just 16 months old, she has already explored 34 parks with her parents, who were inspired by a park ranger. The family aims to foster a love for nature and conservation in Aarya, hoping to inspire others to explore the outdoors with their children.

'We've never met': Djokovic reveals years-long bond with Virat Kohli
description: Tennis icon Novak Djokovic revealed a unique bond with cricket star Virat Kohli, built on mutual respect despite never meeting. The two athletes have been exchanging messages, supporting each other's careers. Djokovic, aiming for his 25th Grand Slam, hopes to meet Kohli in India soon, a sentiment echoed by Kohli's ambition for a World Cup win in 2027. Their shared dedication to excellence transcends their respective sports.

Siya Goyal, her 'lover' Chetan held multiple rehearsals before murder; cops recreate crime scene
description: Two individuals, Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary, allegedly rehearsed Ketan Agrawal's murder multiple times before pushing him off a cliff at Lohagad Fort. Driven by social and family pressures to prevent an arranged marriage, the couple meticulously planned the crime, even attempting it earlier. Police recreated the scene and seized evidence, with a fast-track court now appointed for swift justice.

‘Poison or push?’: Siya Goyal, her ‘lover’ Chetan searched online for ways to kill Ketan, say cops
description: A chilling murder plot unfolded in Pune as a couple, Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary, meticulously planned realtor Ketan Agrawal's death. Online searches for murder methods and rehearsed attempts at Lohagad Fort reveal the premeditated nature of the crime. Driven by social pressures and a desire to prevent an arranged marriage, the duo executed their plan, making the fatal push appear accidental.

Jeff Bezos vs Zohran Mamdani debate: Kevin O’Leary says Amazon founder should run cities
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos sparked a debate on government efficiency and taxation, suggesting New York City's services would falter under his company's operational model. Billionaire Kevin O'Leary echoed these sentiments, calling the city a 'disaster' and warning against taxing the wealthy. Former Mayor Bill de Blasio criticized Bezos' remarks as out of touch. Meanwhile, Bezos also dismissed fears of AI causing job losses, predicting a labor shortage instead.

title: How podcast gave Google engineer confidence to quit, become AI startup founder
description: A 23-year-old engineer, Aashna Doshi, left a lucrative Google position to pursue her AI startup, Bounty. Her journey began with a popular tech podcast, "0 to 1," which connected her with industry leaders and sparked her entrepreneurial ambition.  Doshi's startup offers an outcome-based AI marketplace, a bold move from corporate security to chase a potentially groundbreaking venture.

title: Michael Dell updates on Dell's Texas move days after Abbott's 'welcome home' message
description: Dell Technologies is officially moving its legal base from Delaware to Texas, with 97% of shareholders approving the change. CEO Michael Dell expressed pride in returning the company's legal home to the state where it was founded. This move aligns with Texas's growing appeal for major corporations, including Tesla, Coinbase, and Exxon Mobil, due to its favorable business climate and talent pool.
